SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.resolution

Class JkResolvedDependencyNode

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.depmanagement.resolution.JkResolvedDependencyNode
public class JkResolvedDependencyNode extends Object
A representation of a node in a dependency tree.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    contains(JkModuleId moduleId)
    Returns true if this node or one of its descendant stand for the specified module.
    JkResolvedDependencyNode
    getChild(JkModuleId jkModuleId)
    Returns the getChild node having the specified getModuleId.
    List<JkResolvedDependencyNode>
    getChildren()
    Returns the children nodes for this node in the tree structure.
    List<JkResolvedDependencyNode>
    getChildren(JkModuleId jkModuleId)
    Returns the children nodes for this node having the specified getModuleId.
    Set<JkCoordinate>
    getDescendantModuleCoordinates()
    Returns a set of module coordinates for all descendant modules of this dependency node.
    JkResolvedDependencyNode
    getFirst(JkModuleId jkModuleId)
    Returns first node descendant of this one standing for the specified getModuleId, deep first.
    JkResolvedDependencyNode.JkModuleNodeInfo
    getModuleInfo()
    Convenient method to return relative information about this node, assuming this node stands for a module dependency.
    JkResolvedDependencyNode.JkModuleNodeInfo
    getModuleNodeInfo()
    Convenient method to get the ModuleNodeInfo when this dependency node is a module.
    JkResolvedDependencyNode.JkNodeInfo
    getNodeInfo()
    Returns information relative to this dependency node.
    List<Path>
    getResolvedFiles()
    Returns all files resulting of this dependency node (this node itself plus all descendants).
    JkVersionProvider
    getResolvedVersions()
    Returns the resolved version for this node and all its children.
    boolean
    isModuleNode()
    Returns true if this node stands for a module dependency.

    Constructs a node for the specified versioned module having the specified direct flatten.

    Returns a list of lines standing for the representation of this dependency tree.

    Returns a complete representation string of the tree.

  • Method Details

    • ofModuleDep

      public static JkResolvedDependencyNode ofModuleDep(JkResolvedDependencyNode.JkModuleNodeInfo moduleNodeInfo, List<JkResolvedDependencyNode> children)
      Constructs a node for the specified versioned module having the specified direct flatten.

    • ofRoot

      public static JkResolvedDependencyNode ofRoot(List<JkResolvedDependencyNode> children)

    • ofFileDep

      public static JkResolvedDependencyNode ofFileDep(JkFileDependency dependency, Set<String> configurations)

    • ofFileDep

      public static JkResolvedDependencyNode ofFileDep(JkResolvedDependencyNode.JkFileNodeInfo fileNodeInfo)

    • getResolvedFiles

      public List<Path> getResolvedFiles()
      Returns all files resulting of this dependency node (this node itself plus all descendants).

    • isModuleNode

      public boolean isModuleNode()
      Returns true if this node stands for a module dependency. It returns false if it stands for a file dependency.

    • getModuleNodeInfo

      public JkResolvedDependencyNode.JkModuleNodeInfo getModuleNodeInfo()
      Convenient method to get the ModuleNodeInfo when this dependency node is a module.

    • getModuleInfo

      public JkResolvedDependencyNode.JkModuleNodeInfo getModuleInfo()
      Convenient method to return relative information about this node, assuming this node stands for a module dependency.

    • getNodeInfo

      public JkResolvedDependencyNode.JkNodeInfo getNodeInfo()
      Returns information relative to this dependency node.

    • getChildren

      public List<JkResolvedDependencyNode> getChildren()
      Returns the children nodes for this node in the tree structure.

    • contains

      public boolean contains(JkModuleId moduleId)
      Returns true if this node or one of its descendant stand for the specified module. Evicted nodes are not taken in account.

    • getResolvedVersions

      public JkVersionProvider getResolvedVersions()
      Returns the resolved version for this node and all its children.

    • getDescendantModuleCoordinates

      public Set<JkCoordinate> getDescendantModuleCoordinates()
      Returns a set of module coordinates for all descendant modules of this dependency node.

    • getChildren

      public List<JkResolvedDependencyNode> getChildren(JkModuleId jkModuleId)
      Returns the children nodes for this node having the specified getModuleId.

    • getChild

      public JkResolvedDependencyNode getChild(JkModuleId jkModuleId)
      Returns the getChild node having the specified getModuleId.

    • withMerging

      public JkResolvedDependencyNode withMerging(JkResolvedDependencyNode other)
      Returns a merge of this dependency node with the specified one. The children of the merged node is a union of the two node children.

    • toFlattenList

      public List<JkResolvedDependencyNode> toFlattenList()
      Returns all descendant nodes of this one, deep first.

    • getFirst

      public JkResolvedDependencyNode getFirst(JkModuleId jkModuleId)
      Returns first node descendant of this one standing for the specified getModuleId, deep first.

    • toStrings

      public List<String> toStrings()
      Returns a list of lines standing for the representation of this dependency tree.

    • toDomElement

      public Element toDomElement(Document document, boolean root)

    • toStringTree

      public String toStringTree()
      Returns a complete representation string of the tree.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
